title: Sharp-tec Combination Pliers 160mm, Multifunction for Wire Cutting/Crimping/Twisting/Pulling/Nails Removing, 6-inch Professional Wire Pliers for Home Repair & Plumbing
features: 【All-In-One Pliers】 —— It's professionally designed for lineman twisting and cutting Wires, clamping screws. Screw extractor pliers are designed with wire cutter pliers all in one. The cutting edge is perfect for linesmen, or electricians and can handle most cutting jobs. Work as linesman pliers with the crimper, wire cutters pliers, heavy-duty pliers

【Non-slip Handles】—— The combination pliers have a comfortable and secure design. Side cutters pliers unique handle tempering helps absorb the ''snap'' when cutting wire. The handle is made of environmental PP+TPR materials, provides extra comfort, and reduces hand fatigue

【Special Hardened Treatment】 —— The quenching treatment and brilliant raw material ensure durability. Heavy-duty diagonal cutter, short jaws, and beveled cutting edges permit close cutting of wire, induction-hardened cutting knives for long life. A hardened edge makes it more enduring and stable
【Anti-rust Coating】—— Clear, anti-rust coating extends the effective life of the pliers, preserving their edge sharpness and finish
【After-sales Service】 —— Sharp-tec will let you achieve the correct balance between use safety, dexterity, performance, and price. Please do not hesitate let us know if have any questions
